parameters.text:
:rotating_light: *ACCIÓN URGENTE: GHL API Key expira en {{ $('Build Alert Message').item.json.daysUntilExpiry }} días*

El token de GoHighLevel está por expirar. Esto causará que la integración con sales-team-ai deje de funcionar.

Please renovar el token lo antes posible. Ver #tech-alerts para detalles.

parameters.jsCode:
// No-op: non-critical, already alerted in #tech-alerts
return [{ json: { skipped: true } }];

// No alert needed today
return [{ json: { status: 'ok', message: 'Token has more than 15 days remaining — no alert needed' } }];

_readme.title: Workflow 3: GHL Token Expiry Monitor
_readme.description: Runs daily at 08:00 UTC. Checks days since GHL_LOCATION_API_KEY was last renewed. Alerts #tech-alerts at day 75 (15 days left), escalates to #general at day 85+.
credentials_required: Slack OAuth — for alerts to #tech-alerts and #general
environment_variables: GHL_TOKEN_RENEWED_AT — ISO date string of last manual token renewal (e.g. '2026-03-01T00:00:00Z'). UPDATE THIS after each renewal.
setup_steps: 2. Set N8N environment variable GHL_TOKEN_RENEWED_AT to the date GHL_LOCATION_API_KEY was last renewed
5. IMPORTANT: After every GHL token renewal, update GHL_TOKEN_RENEWED_AT to today's date
